title: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool is best for your needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: Mailchimp and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they cater to different audiences. Mailchimp emphasizes ease of use and affordability for beginners, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple brands. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams managing multiple brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, A/B testing, landing pages
comparison_table.tool_b: Journey designer, multi-brand management, smart segments, transactional email

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business looking for a free or low-cost email marketing solution
You want to build landing pages and conduct A/B testing within the same platform
You need a drag-and-drop editor with an intuitive, easy-to-learn interface
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands and need centralized multi-brand management capabilities
You require advanced journey designer and smart segmentation features
You need transactional email functionality and have a budget for a paid-only platform

faq.q: Is Mailchimp better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp excels for beginners and small businesses due to its free tier and user-friendly interface, with a higher G2 rating of 4.3. Campaign Monitor is better suited for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, offering advanced features like journey designer and multi-brand management. Choose based on your use case rather than overall superiority.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Mailchimp is significantly cheaper for small operations, offering a free tier for up to 500 subscribers with no time limit. Campaign Monitor requires payment from the start at $11/month. However, as your subscriber list grows, pricing will eventually depend on your specific volume and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support email list imports, making migration possible. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists and import them into Mailchimp. You'll need to recreate your campaigns and automation workflows, but your core contact data can transfer smoothly.
